chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D - 1236 of 2023 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) D/o Matter 1. For orders on CMA No.8258/2026 2. For orders on CMA No.8259/2026 3. For orders on CMA No.8260/2026 08.04.2026 Dr. Rana Khan, Advocate for the petitioners. ------------------------------------ 1. Urgency granted. 2-3 Through CMA No. 8260/2026 listed at serial No.3, the petitioner has prayed for recalling of order dated 15.09.2025, whereby the instant petition was dismissed for non-prosecution. Along with the application, the petitioner has filed his affidavit, wherein he has stated that he was note aware about the fixation of the case on 22.10.2025, therefore, he could not appear before the Court. Ms. Shazia Ahmed Hanjrah, learned DAG, who is present in connection with some other cases, after waiving notice, has extended her no objection to the grant of these applications. Accordingly, the listed application bearing CMA No.8260/2026 is granted and the matter stands restored to its original position as it was on 15.09.2025. Let fresh notice be issued to all concerned for 11.08.2026. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Azeem
